case_title: CYRUS TRIVERI ET AL VS. LUKE BERGSTROM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-25-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRIVERI, CYRUS BOUSSINA, NOUSHIN AS TO DEFENDANT BERGSTROM, LUKE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIVERI, CYRUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERGSTROM, LUKE $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,690.00, LUKE BERGSTROM AS THE FATHER RESPONSIBLE FOR ACTIONS OF HIS SON CHRISTIAN WHO WAS A MINOR AT THE TIME OF THE INCIDENT. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PLAINTIFF NOUSHIN BOUSSINA, CYRUS TRIVERI WAS OF MAJORITY ARE AT TIME OF INCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRIVERI, CYRUS BOUSSINA, NOUSHIN AS TO DEFENDANT BERGSTROM, LUKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
